authority.reason: Advisors report a founder merge of PR #115, but no durable approval_artifact (merge SHA / /approve URL) is captured in this record and the merge was not independently verified here. Verbal/second-hand report is not approval evidence (L7).

promotion.reason: Source merge is reported but not evidenced with a merge SHA; the formal production deploy workflows are reported failed; exact production artifact identity is not established. 'Merged' is not 'deployed' — the split below records each truth separately.

source.reason: Merge to main reported by advisors but no merge SHA / approval_artifact captured; not independently verified in this record.

runtime.reason: Formal Cloudflare production deploy workflows reported failed; no successful deployment receipt (deployment id + deployed SHA) exists; live content is inconsistent across observers.

outcome.reason: One observer reported upgraded Motor content live while another public fetch returned the previous homepage title and the old /motors/ page. Observation is contested and attribution to the candidate SHA is unproven.

observation.reason: Cursor reported new content live; an independent advisor fetch returned the previous homepage title and old /motors/ heading. Observers disagree — CDN/host/edge divergence or rollback are all possible.

attribution.reason: No exact deployed SHA is known, so no observed content can be attributed to candidate defb5506. Observation != attribution; the loop cannot close until deployed SHA == candidate SHA is proven.

notes: Motor Proof Job #1 — TRIAGE_REQUIRED, not AWAITING_AUTHORITY. Honest truth split: build+CI proven; render review, source merge, runtime deploy, and live outcome are UNPROVEN/DIVERGED. cost.metered=false and total_usd=0 are PLACEHOLDERS (not metered values, L11); timestamps at T00:00:00Z are date-only anchors, not real event times — both must be replaced with actuals before RECEIPT_COMPLETE (the v1.1 validator blocks RECEIPT_COMPLETE while metered=false). To close: capture merge SHA (authority+promotion.source), obtain a successful deploy receipt with deployment id + deployed SHA (promotion.runtime), wait >=60s, probe apex and www for content markers AND confirm deployed SHA == candidate SHA (outcome.observation + outcome.attribution), fill production_sha (40-hex), receipt_hash, real cost, real timestamps.
